rules.name: Governing Law
rules.description: The contract must be governed by the laws of Delaware or New York. International jurisdictions or other US states are prohibited.
rules.criteria: Extract the governing law jurisdiction. Verify if it is Delaware (DE) or New York (NY). If it is any other state or country, mark as NON_COMPLIANT.

rules.name: Non-Compete Restriction
rules.description: The contract must not contain any non-compete clauses restricting our company's business practices, markets, or product offerings.
rules.criteria: Identify if there is a non-compete clause that binds our company. If any non-compete restriction exists, mark as NON_COMPLIANT. Note: Standard confidentiality covenants are compliant.

rules.name: Liability Cap
rules.description: The contract must contain a clear limitation of liability (liability cap). Uncapped general liability for our company is strictly prohibited.
rules.criteria: Identify if liability is capped. If there is a clause stating that liability is uncapped or lacks a cap (excluding standard exceptions like breach of confidentiality, IP, or willful misconduct), mark as NON_COMPLIANT.

rules.name: Termination Notice Period
rules.description: If a termination for convenience clause exists, the notice period required to terminate must be at least 30 days.
rules.criteria: Extract the notice period for termination for convenience. If either party can terminate for convenience with a notice period less than 30 days, mark as NON_COMPLIANT/WARNING.

rules.name: Audit Rights
rules.description: The contract must not grant the counterparty unrestricted audit rights. Audits must be limited to once per calendar year with reasonable notice.
rules.criteria: Identify if the contract contains audit rights. If the audit rights are unrestricted (e.g. allow audits at any time without notice or limit), mark as NON_COMPLIANT/WARNING.
